Who We Are
Why SPDigitalJourney Exists

Businesses don't struggle because of lack of effort — they struggle because Google's systems are misunderstood.

I was part of the Global Google Maps Division (2007 Hyderabad Pilot Batch) and contributed directly to India's transition from paper maps to digital — working on road mapping, Street View, house numbering, and user-submitted issue resolution. SPDigitalJourney was created to bridge the gap between businesses and Google's systems through clear guidance, not dependency. 📍 Serving 100+ Cities across 7+ States across India.

🗺️

Ex-Google Maps (2007 Pilot)

Part of the global team that digitized India's roads, street views, and local addresses.

🏢

2000+ Street View Projects

Worked with a digital marketing agency on GMB and Street View across India.

🎓

5000+ Trained & Guided

Business owners, students, agencies, and collaborators across 100+ cities.

🏛️

MSME Registered

Government-registered, PAN-based invoicing available. Fully documented work delivery.

Transparency
Terms & Work Model

Full documentation. No false commitments. End-to-end project delivery guaranteed.

Project Start

Immediate upon payment realization.

Setup Duration

4–5 working days for technical setup.

Ranking Timeline

Up to 45 days for Google indexing and algorithmic ranking improvements.

Payment Terms

100% advance via UPI / Bank Transfer / Razorpay. PAN-based invoice available.

Refund Policy

No refunds once work commences. Exceptions for technically unresolvable issues.

Confidentiality

All client credentials and data remain 100% secure, used strictly for verification.

Documentation

Proposal, progress report, and work accomplishment report all provided.

Commitment

No false commitments. No false arguments. End-to-end delivery guaranteed.
